properties.scriptMethodHeader: def Script(spark: SparkSession, in0: DataFrame, in1: DataFrame) -> DataFrame:
properties.script:
from pyspark.sql.functions import col

# Fixed list of input columns to rename
rename_cols = ["Accession #", "Response Needed By Date", "Missing Samples (Px Codes/LAB ID)", "study_id", "report_run_date", "Requested By", "Priority
(High, Medium, Low)", "Lab type", "Visit", "Inquiry/Request Description", "Response or Resolution Details", "Inquiry #/Change Request #", "Lab Collection Date in Vendor File", "Subject ID #", "FileName", "Request Date 
(dd-Mmm-yyyy)", "Response Provided By", "Expected/ Response Date 
(dd-Mmm-yyyy)", "FINAL Status", "Type of Request
(Inquiry/Change Request)"]

# Collect new names from right input
new_names = [row["C1071007"] for row in in1.select("C1071007").collect()]


# Build rename mapping
rename_map = dict(zip(rename_cols, new_names))

# Build final select expressions (preserve column order)
outputCols = [
    col(c).alias(rename_map[c]) if c in rename_map else col(c)
    for c in in0.columns
]

out0 = in0.select(*outputCols)

fields.name: Lab Collection Date in Vendor File

expression.expression: CAST(CASE WHEN (contains(coalesce(lower(Collection_Date_in_CRF_If_Available), ''), lower('N/A')) OR contains(coalesce(lower(Collection_Date_in_CRF_If_Available), ''), lower('NA'))) THEN NULL ELSE Collection_Date_in_CRF_If_Available END AS STRING)
CAST(`Type of Request paranthesesOpenInquiryslashChange RequestparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Accession hash paranthesesOpenIf ApplicableparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Collection Date in eData paranthesesOpenOptionalparanthesesClose` AS string)
CAST(`Response or Resolution Details` AS string)
CAST(`Priority paranthesesOpenHighcomma Mediumcomma LowparanthesesClose` AS STRING)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)
CAST(`Collection Date in CRF paranthesesOpenIf AvailableparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS STRING)
CAST(`Inquiry hashslashChange Request hash` AS DOUBLE)
CAST(`Type of Request paranthesesOpenInquiryslashChange RequestparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Accession hash paranthesesOpenIf ApplicableparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Collection Date in eData paranthesesOpenOptionalparanthesesClose` AS string)
CAST(`Response or Resolution Details` AS string)
CAST(`Priority paranthesesOpenHighcomma Mediumcomma LowparanthesesClose` AS STRING)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)
CAST(`Collection Date in CRF paranthesesOpenIf AvailableparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS STRING)
CAST(`Inquiry hashslashChange Request hash` AS DOUBLE)

CAST((SUBSTRING( report_run_date, 1, ((LEAST((CASE WHEN ((INSTR(report_run_date, '_')) = 0) THEN NULL ELSE (INSTR(report_run_date, '_')) END), (CASE WHEN ((INSTR(report_run_date, ' ')) = 0) THEN NULL ELSE (INSTR(report_run_date, ' ')) END))) - 1))) AS string)
CAST(`Type of Request InquiryChange Request` AS string)
CAST(`Collection Date in eData Optional` AS string)
CAST(`Response or Resolution Details` AS string)
CAST(`Priority High Medium Low` AS string)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)
CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS string)
CAST(`Additional Identifier eg Lab ID Test Name` AS string)

expressions.alias: `Additional Identifier eg Lab ID Test Name`

properties.scriptMethodHeader: def Script(spark: SparkSession, in0: DataFrame, in1: DataFrame) -> DataFrame:
properties.script:
from pyspark.sql.functions import col

# Fixed list of input columns to rename
rename_cols = ["Accession # 
(If Applicable)", "Change
From", "Expected Vendor Action", "Collection Date in eData (Optional)", "study_id", "report_run_date", "Collection Date in CRF
(If Available)", "Requested By", "Data Type", "Priority
(High, Medium, Low)", "Status 2", "Visit", "Inquiry/Request Description", "Response or Resolution Details", "Inquiry #/Change Request #", "Subject ID #", "DM Comments", "Additional Identifier
(e.g., Lab ID, Test Name)", "Change
To", "Response Needed By
Date", "Site ID", "FileName", "Request Date 
(dd-Mmm-yyyy)", "Response Provided By", "Expected/ Response Date 
(dd-Mmm-yyyy)", "Type of Request
(Inquiry/Change Request)", "Status"]

# Collect new names from right input
new_names = [row["Name"] for row in in1.select("Name").collect()]


# Build rename mapping
rename_map = dict(zip(rename_cols, new_names))

# Build final select expressions (preserve column order)
outputCols = [
    col(c).alias(rename_map[c]) if c in rename_map else col(c)
    for c in in0.columns
]

out0 = in0.select(*outputCols)

# Fixed list of input columns to rename
rename_cols = ["Type of Request InquiryChange Request", "Response Needed By Date", "Subject ID", "Missing Samples Px CodesLAB ID", "Requested By", "Lab type", "Accession", "studyid", "Visit", "Response or Resolution Details", "Lab Collection Date in Vendor File", "Inquiry Change Request", "FileName", "Request Date", "Response Provided By", "Expected Response Date", "reportrundate", "FINAL Status", "InquiryRequest Description", "Priority High Medium Low"]

# Collect new names from right input
new_names = [row["C1071007"] for row in in1.select("C1071007").collect()]


# Build rename mapping
rename_map = dict(zip(rename_cols, new_names))

# Build final select expressions (preserve column order)
outputCols = [
    col(c).alias(rename_map[c]) if c in rename_map else col(c)
    for c in in0.columns
]

out0 = in0.select(*outputCols)
